global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested value as an integer
global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object whose keys name the relevant angles and whose values are pixel points [x,y] at the angle vertex

query:triangle_exterior_angle.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly the keys "ABC", "BAC", and "BCD"; each value is the pixel point [x,y] at that angle's vertex

query:parallel_supplement_angle.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly the keys "CFE" and "AEF"; each value is the pixel point [x,y] at that angle's vertex

task:algebraic_angle_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly the keys "A", "B", "C", and "D"; each value is the pixel point [x,y] at that labeled point

task:parallel_algebraic_angle_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly the keys "BPQ", "DQP", and "FRQ"; each value is the pixel point [x,y] at that angle's vertex

task:parallel_transversal_triangle_angle.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with exactly the keys "P", "Q", "R", "S", and "T"; each value is the pixel point [x,y] at that labeled point
